uin_code.source_quote: Star Comprehensive Insurance Policy | UIN : SHAHLIP26044V092526 | POL / COMP / V.24 / 2025

grace_period.source_quote: and can be renewed within the Grace Period of 30 days.

free_look_period.source_quote: The Policyholder shall be allowed free look period of thirty days from date of receipt of the policy document whether electronically or otherwise

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: Expenses related to the treatment of any illness within 30 days from the first policy commencement date shall be excluded except claims arising due to an accident, provided the same are covered

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Expenses related to the treatment of a pre-existing Disease (PED) and its direct complications shall be excluded until the expiry of 36 months of continuous coverage after the date of inception of the first policy with insurer.

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: surgeries/ treatments shall be excluded until the expiry of 24 months of continuous coverage after the date of inception of the first policy with us. This exclusion shall not be applicable for claims arising due to an accident

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Medical expenses incurred for a period not exceeding 60 days prior to the date of hospitalization are payable subject to an admissible hospitalization claim.

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Medical expenses incurred for a period up to 90 days from the date of discharge from the hospital wherever recommended by the Medical Practitioner

day_care_treatments_count.source_note: Per insurer baseline (Star Health day-care procedures page; 540+ procedures)

network_hospital_count.source_note: 14,000+ network hospitals across India (per official Star Health communications, scraped 2026-05-15)

room_rent_capped_at_pct_of_si.source_quote: Room Rent: Room Rent means the amount charged by a Hospital towards Room and Boarding expenses and shall include the associated medical expenses

policy_term_options_years.source_quote: unt in premium, weightage and the calculation in case of two year policy. The wellness services and ac

ayush_coverage.source_quote: AYUSH Treatment: Medical expenses for Inpatient Hospitalization incurred on treatment under Ayurveda, Yoga and Naturopathy, Unani, Siddha and Homeopathy systems of medicines in a AYUSH Hospital is payable up to the Sum Insured.

restoration_benefit.source_quote: automatic restoration of the Basic Sum Insured by 100% immediately upon exhaustion of the Basic Sum Insured and accrued Cumulative Bonus if any, once during the Policy Period

domiciliary_treatment.source_quote: Domiciliary Hospitalization: Domiciliary Hospitalization means medical treatment for an illness/disease/injury which in the normal course would require care and treatment at a hospital but is actually taken while confined at home un

preventive_health_checkup.source_quote: Health Check-up: We will arrange for a Preventive Health Check- up at Our Network Providers for the applicable package as specified below as per opted Sum Insured and subject

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote: Cashless Facility means a facility extended by the insurer to the insured where the payments, of the cost of treatment undergone by the insured in accordance with the Policy Terms and conditions, are directly made to the network provider by the insurer

no_claim_bonus_cap_pct.source_quote: the Insured Person would be entitled to the benefit of Cumulative Bonus calculated at 50% of the Basic Sum Insured under this policy following after every claim free year up to a maximum of 100%.

geographic_coverage.source_quote: All claims under this policy shall be payable in Indian currency.

room_rent_capping.value: Single Private A/C Room or per-day cap per SI tier
room_rent_capping.source_quote: Room Rent: Room Rent means the amount charged by a Hospital towards Room and Boarding expenses and shall include the associated medical expenses

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: the Insured Person would be entitled to the benefit of Cumulative Bonus calculated at 50% of the Basic Sum Insured under this policy following after every claim free year up to a maximum of 100%.
